divisions.title: Rebuilding the Wall
divisions.summary: A cupbearer’s grief, a night ride, and a wall built with sword in hand.

divisions.title: The Law Read Aloud
divisions.summary: Ezra reads from dawn to midday; weeping turns to joy and covenant.

divisions.title: Nehemiah’s Reforms
divisions.summary: Jerusalem repopulated, the dedication sung, and compromises confronted.
